failure_modes.text: Cargo-cult application can force a familiar checklist onto a novel problem that needs a different frame.
failure_modes.mitigation: Audit whether the checklist was designed for this type of problem; if it was borrowed from a different domain, challenge every item for relevance.

failure_modes.text: Cognitive clutter can defeat the point of the checklist when the list becomes too verbose or irrelevant to guide action.
failure_modes.mitigation: Trim the checklist to the minimum viable set: each item must directly prevent a known failure mode, not just document thoroughness.

failure_modes.text: Checklist completion can create false confidence when the list never tested whether the underlying assumptions were still true.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when checklist completion is mistaken for problem resolution
failure_modes.mitigation: Pair checklist completion with an assumption check: ask whether the conditions the list was built for still hold.

premortem_questions.text: What’s the worst-case misuse or failure scenario? Are we okay with that risk? If not, how to mitigate it?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What’s the worst-case misuse or failure scenario? Are we okay with that risk? If not, how to mitigate it?

premortem_questions.text: Does this checklist accurately capture the essential complexity of this specific problem, or am I trying to fit a square peg into a round hole?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Does this checklist accurately capture the essential complexity of this specific problem, or am I trying to fit a square peg into a round hole?

premortem_questions.text: Is this process driving commitment and action, or merely enforcing a bureaucratic tick-box mentality?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Is this process driving commitment and action, or merely enforcing a bureaucratic tick-box mentality?

heuristics.text: Enforce completeness by using a checklist to cover all distinct branches of the problem without overlap.
Ruthlessly cull the list to the make-or-break checks so the process stays usable under pressure.
Keep the checklist simple and concise so it reduces load instead of adding noise.

curation_notes.summary: Focused on omission prevention, simplicity, and anti-cargo-cult safeguards rather than on broad operating-manual sprawl.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor implementation detail beyond the raw source's stronger operating-discipline and anti-bureaucracy guidance.
open_questions: The first heuristic compresses the MECE framing into a checklist-native action so it stays useful outside consulting-specific wording.

allies: The raw allies section is strong on systems-thinking, cognitive-load-theory, and Feynman-technique as later relation material.
antagonists: The raw antagonists section includes diffuse creativity and theory-of-mind tensions, but those are less clean at the current canonical target surface.
structured_tensions: The source is tension-real around cargo-cult completion and assumption drift, but it lacks a dedicated structured tension block.
